name: PNW Specialty Grocery
shelfContext: premium pantry and local maker endcap
notes: Best early wholesale target: local story plus premium condiment discovery.

name: PNW Co-op / Natural Market
notes: Lead with local, clean-use cases, recipe cards, and balanced flavor.

name: West Coast Asian Grocery
shelfContext: ramen, noodle, dumpling, and sauce aisle
notes: Highest ramen-context velocity; spicy and shoyu language matters.

name: Premium Pantry Boutique
notes: Lower velocity, higher story value; merchandising needs use-case cards.

name: Butcher / BBQ Specialty
shelfContext: marinade, wing, and grill sauce set
notes: Sell as wings, steak marinade, pork chop glaze, not ramen-only.

name: College / Urban Market
shelfContext: grab-and-go noodles and quick meal aisle
notes: Fast-meal storytelling and spicy demand should drive reorder speed.

name: Suburban Gourmet Market
shelfContext: family dinner and premium condiment aisle
notes: Original and Citrus need to carry the first case; Spicy is secondary.

name: Canada Asian Specialty
notes: Strong ramen and shoyu context; watch import/logistics timing.
